task_completion.description: Verify a Delivery Trip is created and assigned to the correct driver and vehicle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Delivery Trip record in ERPNext with 'Alex Driver' in the Driver field and 'WP-TRK-01' in the Vehicle field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Delivery Trip includes the correct Delivery Notes for the specified customers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Delivery Stops or Delivery Notes table within the Delivery Trip. It must contain entries linked to the customers 'Chi-Chis' and 'Consumers and Consumers Express'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Delivery Trip has been submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Submitted' status indicator (usually a colored badge at the top left/right) on the Delivery Trip screen, or the presence of 'Cancel'/'Amend' buttons which only appear after submission.

task_completion.description: Verify a Vehicle Log is created for the correct vehicle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Vehicle Log record in ERPNext with 'WP-TRK-01' selected in the Vehicle or License Plate field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Vehicle Log updates the odometer to exactly 15120.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Odometer' field in the Vehicle Log screen showing the exact value '15120'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Vehicle Log records a fuel expense totaling exactly $60.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Fuel section in the Vehicle Log. The 'Fuel Qty' and 'Price' fields must be filled out such that their product equals 60 (e.g., Qty 15 and Price 4), or a total fuel cost field explicitly shows 60.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the Vehicle Log has been submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Submitted' status indicator on the Vehicle Log screen, or the presence of post-submission buttons like 'Cancel' or 'Amend'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ERPNext web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ERPNext web interface in a browser, not terminal windows or API testing tools like Postman.

integrity.description: Verify the records are genuinely created within the ERPNext system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard ERPNext UI elements like the sidebar, top navigation bar, breadcrumbs, and standard form layouts. The data should not be typed into a generic text editor or spreadsheet.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the submission status.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open in the screenshots that might have been used to alter the DOM to show 'Submitted' or specific field values.
